title: A Girl, a Guy, and a Gob
writer: Frank Ryan, Bert Granet, Grover Jones
actors: George Murphy, Lucille Ball, Edmond O'Brien
plot: Stephen is a shy, quiet man who is an executive for a shipping firm. He meets Dot at the opera where she had his seats, and the next day she shows up as his temporary secretary. Then Coffee Cup comes to town to see Dot, his gal. W...
